category_sources: source_facts.description says universal certificate conversion tool; official Redwax Tool page describes reading, filtering, and writing certificates and keys.
display_name_sources: Official project page heading is Redwax Tool; source_facts.name is redwax-tool.
docs_sources: Official Redwax Tool page includes overview, examples, downloads, source-control links, and support information; it is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Redwax Tool page says source code is stored in Bitbucket and links to source.redwax.eu.
tags_sources: Official Redwax Tool page lists PEM, PKCS12, PKCS11 smartcard, NSS database, YAML, XML, and JSON certificate/key operations.
